calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-02-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Cindy Lee, Esq. for and with the Plaintiff Phillip Lim,
Plaintiff's Witness Phillip Lim was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by defendant Stephanie A. Gonzales.
Exhibit 1 - Lease -------------------------- ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three Day Notice --------------- ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Proof of Service --------------- ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Judgment for Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 513 Eureka St., San Francisco, CA. 94114
Lease is forfeited.
Back Rent Damages in the amount of $4,300.00
Costs $465.00
Attorney fees $775.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $5,540.00
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court.
